name: logseq-text-toolkit
description: A toolkit for text formatting and manipulation in Logseq
author: duiliuliu

logseq.title: Text Toolkit
logseq.description: A toolkit for text formatting and manipulation

scripts.build: vite build --mode test && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/translations && cp -f src/translations/*.json dist/translations/ && npm run copy-css
scripts.copy-css: mkdir -p dist && cp -f src/components/SettingsModal/settingsModal.css dist/ && cp -f src/components/Modal/modal.css dist/ && cp -f src/components/Toolbar/toolbar.css dist/ && cp -f src/components/Comment/inlineComment.css dist/ && cp -f src/styles/customsToolbarItems.css dist/
